headline: Realty Income’s Apollo Backing Shifts Growth Toward European Net Lease Deals
summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) has entered a $1b capital partnership with Apollo to support its expansion in European net lease real estate. The arrangement is designed to fund acquisitions in Europe while keeping return targets intact. European properties now account for a meaningful share of Realty Income’s annualized base rent, marking a shift in its geographic mix. Realty Income is widely known for its triple net lease model, where tenants cover property level expenses under long term...
